# Zero（零点）

Zero is a Chinese tutorial website for professionals. The first domain is AIGC.

## Primary Content

- /ai/ : AIGC documentation hub
- /ai/concepts/ : Concept tutorials
- /ai/tools/ : Tool tutorials
- /ai/methodology/ : Methodology
- /ai/cases/ : Case studies
- /ai/opensource/ : Open source references
- /ai/resources/ : Resource recommendations
- /ai/logs/ : Field notes
- /news/ : News updates
- /community/ : Community entry

## Crawling Notes

- Content is public and crawlable.
- Prefer sitemap first: https://zeroto.pages.dev/sitemap.xml
- Follow internal links for deeper pages.
